Name | Nation | Total | [SP](/wiki/Short_program_(figure_skating) "Short program (figure skating)") | | [FS](/wiki/Free_skating "Free skating") |

was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") in the [2015–16 season](/wiki/2015%E2%80%9316_figure_skating_season "2015–16 figure skating season"). A part of the [2015–16 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2015%E2%80%9316_ISU_Challenger_Series "2015–16 ISU Challenger Series"), the 1st edition of the annual event were held on 15–18 October 2015 at the Palace of Sports in [Saransk, Russia](/wiki/Saransk,_Russia "Saransk, Russia"). Medals were awarded in [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").[[1]](#cite_note-Ornament-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Figure skating competition held in Saransk, Mordovia, Russia

| 2015 Mordovian Ornament | |
| --- | --- |
| Type: | [ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/ISU_Challenger_Series "ISU Challenger Series") |
| Date: | October 15 – 18 |
| Season: | [2015–16](/wiki/2015%E2%80%9316_figure_skating_season "2015–16 figure skating season") |
| Location: | [Saransk](/wiki/Saransk "Saransk"), [Mordovia](/wiki/Mordovia "Mordovia"), [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") |
| Venue: | Palace of Sports of the city Saransk |
| Champions | |
| Men's singles:   [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") [Maxim Kovtun](/wiki/Maxim_Kovtun "Maxim Kovtun") | |
| Ladies' singles:   [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") [Anna Pogorilaya](/wiki/Anna_Pogorilaya "Anna Pogorilaya") | |
| Pairs:   [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") [Yuko Kavaguti](/wiki/Yuko_Kavaguti "Yuko Kavaguti") / [Alexander Smirnov](/wiki/Alexander_Smirnov_(figure_skater) "Alexander Smirnov (figure skater)") | |
| Ice dance:   [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") [Elena Ilinykh](/wiki/Elena_Ilinykh "Elena Ilinykh") / [Ruslan Zhiganshin](/wiki/Ruslan_Zhiganshin "Ruslan Zhiganshin") | |
|  | |

The **2015 Mordovian Ornament** was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") in the [2015–16 season](/wiki/2015%E2%80%9316_figure_skating_season "2015–16 figure skating season"). A part of the [2015–16 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2015%E2%80%9316_ISU_Challenger_Series "2015–16 ISU Challenger Series"), the 1st edition of the annual event were held on 15–18 October 2015 at the Palace of Sports in [Saransk, Russia](/wiki/Saransk,_Russia "Saransk, Russia"). Medals were awarded in [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").[[1]](#cite_note-Ornament-1)
